message:
chore: Add target_*/ and target-*/ to gitignore

Ignore alternative target directories used for different build modes
(cargo check, tests, benchmarks, etc.).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -30,8 +30,9 @@ temp_*.rs
 # Local backup directories
 .local_backup_*/
 
-# Benchmark target directories
-target_bench_*/
+# Alternative target directories (benchmarks, tests, checks)
+target_*/
+target-*/
 
 # Web test artifacts
 web/node_modules/
